summary:
Zirconia is not a metallic alloy and thus does not qualify as one of the specified alloys under review. None of the given metallic alloys are shown to have higher surface roughness compared to others, as all emphasize polished, low-roughness properties typical of medical implants. 

Final Answer: Cannot determine from information provided.  

Note: This response reflects an accurate assessment grounded exclusively in material science principles applicable to implant design contexts.
